title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 28 - 2017: Colorado Hot Springs in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief vlog on March 1st, 2017, reflecting on forgetting February only has 28 days. He discusses staying up late working on his website — fixing image sizing issues on his aliens page and reducing picture dimensions for better layout. He also shows Google Earth footage of Colorado hot springs and muses about future vlog content featuring his website pages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: there's a magic and beauty when something is perfect, worth the tedious work
plans to show website pages as content once Google Earth material runs out

transcript.text: Hello Living in Boulder vlog for February 28th because today is March 1st. Oh wow, I forgot there's only 28 days in February. It's March already. Oh my god. I definitely have to today, tomorrow. I'm going to go and send my medicaid paperwork in, man. Get that over with.
Only one month. I'll do that tomorrow. That'll be my priority. Today I just got carried away. Today I'm working on my website. I'm kind of like 11. I was up to like 2 or something last night though.

Yeah. And yeah, I was doing, yeah, I went to my Aliens pages and I saw those were like way past generational. So fixing those and then I finished, oh and I was reducing the size of the pictures I made at the site before and I decided 300 pixels per picture.

Because that's what I decided on the side column. But then I decided to do just 20%. And that's too big. That's 20% is actually smaller than 300 pixels for a 15 inch screen. So I like guessed wrong. I referred to 300 pixels. If I had all those pictures, I had to reduce them all. A lot of work.

But there's a magic and a beauty that comes out when something's perfect, you know. So that's what I'm going to work on. But yeah, priority. I forgot to talk about this. Yeah, this is just Hot Springs. I'm doing my Google Earth stuff and I haven't done this one yet. This is not a very good one though because I zoomed in really fast. It could give some people a headache, but whatever.

Later on, I think after I exhaust all of my Google Earth stuff that I've done, I think I'll do just my website. Just different pages on my website. And I'll be like, yeah, check out this website. You know, because by then, my website will be cool enough to check out, I think. You know, at least the various pages that I show that I say to check out, you know.
It'll help me motivate to get certain pages done. I wonder how many days will go by where I show a new page on my website.
And, um, or on my Google Earth, you know, before I run out of stuff to do. I wonder if, if that happens and I'm ready, I'm actually done with my website.
Or ready to, you know, start riding my bike and, you know, done doing the main fix-ups on it.
So, anyway, yeah, I'm really tired. I'm kind of high right now. But I don't know, I might work. Hmm.
Usually a little bit more work. I was totally addicted to it. Um, okay, so that's enough talking. Peace out.
